mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( reporter_idx, reported_idx, post_idx, report_content, target_type, report_status, report_created_at ) VALUES ( #{reporter_idx}, #{reported_idx}, #{post_idx}, #{report_content}, 'POST', 0, NOW() )

INSERT INTO report ( reporter_idx, reported_idx, post_idx, comment_idx, report_content, target_type, report_status, report_created_at ) VALUES ( #{reporter_idx}, #{reported_idx}, #{post_idx}, #{comment_idx}, #{report_content}, 'COMMENT', 0, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT r.report_idx, r.post_idx, r.report_content, r.report_created_at, r.target_type, r.report_status,
reporter.member_idx AS reporter_idx, reporter.member_nickname AS reporter_nickname,
reported.member_idx AS reported_idx, reported.member_nickname AS reported_nickname
FROM report r LEFT JOIN member reporter ON r.reporter_idx = reporter.member_idx LEFT JOIN member reported ON r.reported_idx = reported.member_idx
